creator: joneum@FreeBSD.org
text:
I am testing seamonkey 2.39 in poudriere.

9.3 amd64/i386 and 10.3 amd64/i386 stop with a clang bug.


it would be useful, to mark this port as broken?

On FreeBSD 12, seamonkey build is ok.

The log file is to large for bugzilla: 413 Request Entity Too Large

Here are the links to the build error:

http://builder.miwibox.org/data/93amd64-ports/2016-09-13_07h59m02s/logs/errors/seamonkey-2.39_11.log

http://builder.miwibox.org/data/93i386-ports/2016-09-13_07h59m02s/logs/errors/seamonkey-2.39_11.log

http://builder.miwibox.org/data/10amd64-ports/2016-09-13_08h25m25s/logs/errors/seamonkey-2.39_11.log

http://builder.miwibox.org/data/10i386-ports/2016-09-13_08h26m38s/logs/errors/seamonkey-2.39_11.log
